sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49674" key="i)alemw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰᾱλεμ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n49674.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like an</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἰάλεμος</foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wretched</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
